commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates daemon safe-restart CLI help, deferred status text, and daemon docs to describe bounded deferral, while also carrying a one-line test-project expectation already present on current main.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +1, Docs 0. Total +9 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source shows `--force --wait` and `--safe --wait` are rejected while the command-facing docs/help need bounded safe-restart wording; the PR body now includes terminal output for the changed help text.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can correct the remaining copy/docs blockers without changing runtime behavior.

target.title: fix(cli): clarify safe restart bounded-then-force behavior in help and docs
target.body:
## Summary
Clarify that `daemon restart --safe` uses a bounded deferred wait (default 5 minutes via `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs`) and may force a restart after the timeout expires. Update CLI help text, user-facing status messages, and daemon docs to reflect the actual bounded-then-force behavior.

Fixes #92194

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

**Behavior addressed**: The `--safe` restart CLI help and docs described "restart after active work drains" without mentioning the bounded default wait or that the restart can be forced after the `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` budget expires. Users relied on `--safe` semantics and were surprised when active work was cut.

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node 24.13.1, Linux x86_64
- **Branch**: `fix/issue-92194` (PR #95397) checked out locally
- **Code paths changed**: `src/cli/daemon-cli/register-service-commands.ts` (CLI help text), `src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.ts` (deferred restart status messages), `docs/cli/daemon.md`
- **Test framework**: Vitest 4.1.8

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
git fetch origin pull/95397/head:pr-95397-fix && git checkout pr-95397-fix
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
pnpm test src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts src/infra/restart.test.ts --reporter=verbose
pnpm openclaw daemon restart --help
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/cli/daemon.md
```

**After-fix evidence** (real terminal output captured 2026-06-21):

Tests — all 39 pass (25 lifecycle + 14 restart):
```
$ pnpm test src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts src/infra/restart.test.ts --reporter=verbose

 RUN  v4.1.8 /home/0668001085/workspace/openclaw

[infra shard]
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.test.ts > findGatewayPidsOnPortSync > parses lsof output 91ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.test.ts > findGatewayPidsOnPortSync > returns empty when lsof fails 2ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.test.ts > cleanStaleGatewayProcessesSync > kills stale gateway pids 6ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.test.ts > cleanStaleGatewayProcessesSync > uses explicit port override 3ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.test.ts > cleanStaleGatewayProcessesSync > returns empty when no stale listeners 2ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.test.ts > triggerOpenClawRestart > does not kickstart after bootstrap 2ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.test.ts > triggerOpenClawRestart > continues when service is already loaded 1ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts > deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle timeout > waits indefinitely 28ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts > deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle timeout > respects custom maxWaitMs 3ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts > deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle timeout > clamps oversized poll intervals 1ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts > deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle timeout > carries timeout intent 2ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts > deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle timeout > calls onReady when pending drops to 0 1ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts > deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle timeout > immediately restarts when pending is 0 1ms
 ✓ |infra| src/infra/restart.deferral-timeout.test.ts > deferGatewayRestartUntilIdle timeout > handles getPendingCount error 1ms

 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  14 passed (14)

[cli shard]
 ✓ |cli| src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts > runDaemonRestart health checks > re-bootstraps installed LaunchAgent 130ms
 ✓ |cli| src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts > runDaemonRestart health checks > requests safe restart over RPC 2ms
 ✓ |cli| src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts > runDaemonRestart health checks > keeps force restart on non-safe path 2ms
 ✓ |cli| src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts > runDaemonRestart health checks > forwards --safe --skip-deferral 1ms
 ✓ |cli| src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts > runDaemonRestart health checks > rejects --skip-deferral without --safe 3ms
 ... (25 tests total, all passed)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed (25)
```

CLI help — `--safe` now documents bounded-then-force contract:
```
$ pnpm openclaw daemon restart --help

OpenClaw 2026.6.8 (ca49bf2) — All your chats, one OpenClaw.

Usage: openclaw daemon restart [options]

Restart the Gateway service (launchd/systemd/schtasks)

Options:
  --force            Restart immediately without waiting for active gateway work
                     (default: false)
  -h, --help         Display help for command
  --json             Output JSON (default: false)
  --safe             Request an OpenClaw-aware restart after active work drains
                     (bounded wait; may force after
                     gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs expires; set
                     deferralTimeoutMs=0 for indefinite wait) (default: false)
  --skip-deferral    Bypass the safe-restart deferral gate; requires --safe
                     (default: false)
  --wait <duration>  Wait duration before forcing restart (ms, 10s, 5m; 0 waits
                     indefinitely). For --force restarts; not compatible with
                     --safe
```

Docs check:
```
$ node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/cli/daemon.md
Docs MDX check passed (1 files, 45ms).
```

**Observed result after the fix**: CLI `--help` output now accurately states the `--safe` restart is a bounded wait that may force after `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` expires, and points operators to `deferralTimeoutMs=0` for indefinite wait. Deferred restart status messages and daemon docs reflect the same bounded-then-force contract. All 39 existing tests continue to pass.

**What was not tested**: End-to-end `openclaw daemon restart --safe` execution against a live Gateway (requires a running daemon/Gateway process which is not available in this CI/checkout environment). The CLI help text change is a static string update verified above; the underlying restart lifecycle behavior is unchanged and covered by the 39 existing tests.

**Evidence provenance**: Terminal output captured from a real local checkout of `pr-95397-fix` on Node 24.13.1 / Linux x86_64, 2026-06-21. The `pnpm openclaw daemon restart --help` command triggered a TypeScript build because the build stamp was stale — the help output reflects the current source, not a cached artifact.

## Tests and validation
| Test Type | Result | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Unit Tests | ✅ | 39/39 passed (lifecycle 25, restart.deferral-timeout 7, restart 7) |
| Type Check | ✅ | No type errors in changed files |
| Lint | ✅ | oxlint clean, oxfmt compliant |
| Docs Check | ✅ | check-docs-mdx passed |

## Risk checklist
**Did user-visible behavior change?** `No` - Only CLI help text, status messages, and documentation wording changed. Runtime restart behavior is unchanged.
**Did config, environment, or migration behavior change?** `No`
**Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change?** `No`

## Current review state
**What is the next action?** Maintainer review requested. Real CLI help evidence captured above, 2026-06-21.
